How Social Media Stocks Fared During The Pandemic
summary: With half of the world's population in isolation for the better part of two months, businesses are slowly starting to come back online. But one industry that never stopped during this crisis was social media. Unlike the global economy, these companies were anything but on a virtual standstill, proving that short of a mass power outage, social media will always be on.

headline: The First Week of June Is All About the May's Jobs Report
summary: The highlight of this week will be most certainly be the May unemployment report, as the Bureau of Labor Statistics is expected to report another decrease of 8 million nonfarm payrolls after April's record decline of 20.5 million. But several notable companies will also be releasing their earnings reports and discussing their strategies for the post-COVID-19 era.

headline: Amazon, Apple, Walmart, Other Retailers Shutter Stores, Scale Back Operations In Areas Worst Hit With Protests
